title: Crispy Fried Cauliflower Bites with Ukrainian Twist
description: A crunchy and savory Ukrainian-inspired appetizer made with crispy fried cauliflower bites. Serve as a snack or side dish.
instructions: In a bowl, mix together cauliflower florets, salty soy sauce, and tofu (if using).
Dip each cauliflower floret into the flour, shaking off excess.
Heat 1/2 cup of vegetable oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat.
Fry the cauliflower florets in batches until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes.
Transfer the fried cauliflower to a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
In a small bowl, mix together crunchy chopped peanuts and fried onion flakes.
Garnish the crispy fried cauliflower bites with the peanut mixture.
